attr.title: Pokemon Fire Ash
attr.desc: Pokémon Fire Ash is a fan-made Pokémon game that follows the journey of Ash Ketchum through multiple regions just like in the Pokémon anime series.
attr.inst: Download the Windows bundle from https://pokemonfireash.net/windows and add the zip file to the `pkmn_fireash` folder. On first launch the game will be unzipped for you.
